home.subtitle: A one-stop hub for students and AI enthusiasts: industry news, university & company courses, and internship opportunities — kept as real-time as possible.

information.desc: Cutting-edge AI insights: compute, data, models, algorithms, industry applications, and startup tools. Auto-aggregated from papers, research blogs, and tech media.

courses.desc: University open courses, company certification programs, and student competitions — curated for anyone learning AI.

internship.desc: Real-time internship listings, referral opportunities, AI/CS resume & outreach templates, and a high-schooler application timeline.

activity.desc: Global AI competitions, open-source SDG projects, and local community action guides — for students ready to turn AI skills into real-world impact.

about.title: About this project
about.desc: Uni AI Hub was built in summer 2026 by the Curriculum Coordinator of University High School's AI Club. The goal: keep students and AI enthusiasts informed with industry news, learning resources, and internship opportunities.

information.title: AI Industry News
information.desc: Auto-aggregated from arXiv papers, company research blogs, tech media, and developer communities. Refreshes every 30 minutes. Filter by source or topic below.
information.empty: No matching content. Try a different filter.

courses.title: Learning & Training
courses.desc: University open courses, company self-paced certification programs, and student competition / open-source opportunities.

internship.title: Internship & Referrals
internship.desc: Real-time sync from student-maintained internship databases (AI/ML roles). Also includes club-curated referral info, resume templates, and application timelines.
internship.searchPlaceholder: Search by company or role, e.g. Google, Research, NLP...
internship.searchEmpty: No matching positions. Try a different keyword.

activity.title: Global Initiatives & Community Action
activity.desc: Curated global competitions, open-source SDG projects, and local community action guides — for students ready to apply AI skills to real-world challenges.

internshipResources.blizzardNote: Gaming industry internships / campus programs. Monitor their Careers page and University Program.
internshipResources.rivianNote: EV and autonomous driving internships. Follow their University Program.
internshipResources.resumeDesc: Curated resume structure and cold email tips for high school students pursuing AI/CS roles.
internshipResources.resumeDetail: Education / Technical Skills (languages · frameworks · tools) / Project Experience (STAR method + quantified results) / Research or Competition / Extracurriculars & Leadership
internshipResources.professorDetail: Greeting + one-sentence intro → Why this professor's research interests you (cite specific papers/projects) → What you can contribute → Brief closing + resume attachment note
internshipResources.industryDetail: Politely request a referral via LinkedIn or email. Include your resume link + 1–2 personal highlights. Avoid overly generic template vibes.
internshipResources.timelineTitle: B. High School Tech Competition & Internship Timeline
internshipResources.timelineDesc: Key milestones by month — confirm exact dates on official websites each year.
internshipResources.period0item0: Watch for next summer's research program applications (e.g. Stanford HAI/AIMI)
internshipResources.period0item1: Start preparing / updating your resume and portfolio
internshipResources.period1item0: Apple Swift Student Challenge typically opens
internshipResources.period1item1: Peak season for high school research & summer school applications
internshipResources.period2item0: Google Summer of Code student application window (verify age & eligibility requirements)
internshipResources.period2item1: Companies release summer internship / campus program offers
internshipResources.period3item0: Summer courses, research, and internships in full swing
internshipResources.period3item1: Kaggle competitions run year-round — join anytime
